name: MinigotchiV3
description: Pwnagotchi-style ESP32 firmware — passively rides nearby WiFi to collect handshakes / pwn networks. Requires a DUAL-CORE ESP32 (single-core ESP32 / ESP8266 are NOT supported).
note: ESP32 (dual-core) build, NOT the ESP8266 dj1ch/minigotchi. latest = dj1ch/minigotchi-V3 to match flash_core _MINIGOTCHI_API; dj1ch/minigotchi-ESP32 kept as alt_esp32 per researched correction.
